ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "slno" INTEGER /* Sequential number for the candidate */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the candidate resides */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the candidate */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school attended by the candidate */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Code of the school attended */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "area_of_residence" INTEGER /* Area of residence (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "caste" TEXT /* Caste category of the candidate */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Disability status of the candidate (if applicable) */,
  "mat_marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in the MAT examination */,
  "sat_marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in the SAT examination */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks calculated from all examinations */,
  "lt_marks" INTEGER /* Marks from the LT examination */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate based on total marks */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the candidate's parent or guardian */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's record was last updated */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  "aadhar_number" TEXT /* Aadhar number of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_caste FOREIGN KEY ("caste") REFERENCES caste_categories ("caste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_disability FOREIGN KEY ("disability") REFERENCES disabilities ("disability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the school is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* School's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* School's email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's website URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caste_categories" (
  "caste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caste category */,
  "caste_name" TEXT /* Name of the caste category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes regarding the caste category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caste category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caste category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caste_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disabilities" (
  "disability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability type */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Name of the disability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the examination was conducted */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the examination */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks available for the examination */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the examination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the examination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the examination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the candidate */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination taken */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the candidate in the examination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_roll_no FOREIGN KEY ("roll_no") REFERENCES candidates ("roll_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination related to the statistics */,
  "average_marks" REAL /* Average marks obtained in the examination */,
  "pass_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of candidates who passed the examination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance statistics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_statistics_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id")
)
